description: Product Description These bags are crafted to meet the highest quality standards, exclusively manufactured for us in Europe. What sets them apart is their unique advantage of not requiring sea transportation. Made from 36gsm Kraft paper, these bags offer versatility and attractiveness for all your packaging needs. Their elegant striped design makes them a popular choice for weddings, birthdays, and various gatherings, serving as treat or favor bags. Moreover, these same bags can be found in confectionery shops, pick n mix stalls, bakeries, delis, and numerous other retail outlets. By opting for these bags, you not only contribute to the preservation of our planet but also enhance the aesthetic appeal of your products or events. Their visually pleasing appearance make them a preferred option for those who value both sustainability and style. Best for Birthdays, Parties & specific color theme-based parties Candy Stripe sweet paper bags are a popular choice for birthday parties due to their attractive design and practicality. These bags, made from high-quality paper, feature vibrant candy stripes that instantly catch attention and create an exciting atmosphere. Ideal Choice for Halloween & X-Mas These professional-grade paper bags offer a combination of durability and aesthetics, ensuring that kids can safely carry their candy loot throughout the night while also adding a touch of festive flair. Scope of Use Made from high-quality materials, these bags are designed to withstand the weight of various products types without tearing or breaking, providing peace of mind to both parents and children alike. Available in Multiple Colours Candy Stripe paper bags are a versatile and eye-catching packaging solution available in an array of vibrant colors. Designed with both aesthetics and functionality in mind, these bags not only enhance the visual appeal of any product but also provide a secure and convenient way to store sweets. MULTIPLE USES Use these versatile paper bags as party favor bags at weddings or treat bags at baby showers. Excellent for use at candy buffet bars and cookie decorating stations. Candy paper helps to keep the wrapped candy fresh by preventing moisture from entering and providing a barrier against contamination. Candy paper bags can be used for various art and craft projects, such as scrap booking, card making, and origami. In the food industry, candy paper bag is often used to wrap individual portions of food items for presentation purposes, such as desserts, petit fours and baked goods. Candy paper bag provides a protective barrier that keeps the candy fresh and enhances its appearance.
